overview: Restoration Men's Health specializes in hormone replacement therapy for men with low testosterone using testosterone injections administered approximately every 8 days, and also offers medically supervised weight loss programs combining medications with diet and exercise.
highlights: Largest andrology practice in the metropolitan area
Board certified physicians with expert clinical staff
Collaborates with university-based urologists, cardiologists, and endocrinologists
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone seeking hormone replacement therapy and medically supervised weight loss.
